purpose: Single file-backed Source Truth Plan for The Book, Nerdkle/NMCLR, Speaker/Atlas, and TinkerDen/Medulla build references.
proof_boundary: This folder is a source-truth plan and evidence bundle, not proof that full automation is built.
GitHub main is the current shared source-truth anchor after promotion.
Betsy desktop Nerdkle The Book is included as raw reference material under source-truth-plan/references/betsy_desktop_nerdkle_the_book/.
Raw reference material does not replace the source-truth plan or promote any draft as canonical prose.
Chatlog index is discovery evidence only; durable source material must still be copied into repo-backed files.
